item.title:

Which player will score the first goal in the game bet
item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 11min #WHFreeBet competition!
Which player will score the first goal in the game between Man City and Arsenal on Sunday?
Send your answer in followed by #WHFreeBet and you'll be in with a chance of winning a £50 free bet.
18+ | Terms - https:// wh.bet/WHFreeBet 8 3 356
